baseline.subject: Add Mira Core Phase 26 runtime controls validation

purpose: Roll Phase 25 runtime-slice candidate and Phase 26 operator-controls/config-gates into one current preflight readiness assessment.
Define what can be said about runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only before any runtime is implemented, enabled, or authorized.
Preserve a validation-only decision surface that can guide a future local dry-run preflight slice without becoming runtime proof.
nonGoals: No server, listener, route, HTTP, WebSocket, or network behavior.
No database, store, file, migration, queue, lease, auth, key, or secret behavior.
No local execution, shell, PTY, browser, screenshot, OCR, send, deploy, trade, memory/profile commit, or output-file behavior.
No source-store writes and no mutation of Phase 25 or Phase 26 artifacts.
builderPatchMustSatisfy: Default readiness decision must be remain_validation_only.
eligible_for_future_local_dry_run_preflight may be represented only as non-authorizing future eligibility, never as runtime authorization.
Reject stale Phase 25 or Phase 26 baselines.
Reject missing or unsafe Phase 26 controls.
Carry all listed unsatisfied gates forward.
Keep all proof and side-effect boundaries literal and testable.
CLI, if implemented later, must be stdout-only and ignore output-file flags.

staticValidationRules.description: Phase 25 runtime-slice dependency must point to commit 3efa9c5 and the exact candidate slice.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Phase 25 commit, fixture path, module path, or candidate slice id is missing or stale.

staticValidationRules.description: Phase 26 runtime-controls dependency must point to commit b125eee and current controls.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Phase 26 commit, fixture path, module path, or controls-current marker is missing or stale.

staticValidationRules.description: runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only stays unavailable and non-authorizing.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: The candidate claims runtime availability, authorization, execution, listener, queue, or store behavior.

staticValidationRules.description: Runtime flag, loopback plan, kill switch, dry-run fallback, rollback/disable, telemetry preview, and port/config refs must all be present.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Any Phase 26 control is absent or marked not current.

staticValidationRules.description: Runtime flag defaults disabled/off and remains dev-only, local-only, operator-visible, and non-authorizing.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: The runtime flag is default-on, not visible, not local/dev-only, authorizing, or runtime_started=true.

staticValidationRules.description: Local binding plan is loopback-only and performs no listener, port, route, or network behavior.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Allowed hosts include public interfaces or the plan claims a listener, port, route, or network action.

staticValidationRules.description: Operator kill switch is visible, fail-closed, and testable, but not claimed as live runtime wiring.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Kill switch is missing, ignored, not fail-closed, or claimed as runtime-wired proof.

staticValidationRules.description: Dry-run fallback is preview-only and no tested dry-run runtime path is claimed in Phase 27.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Dry-run fallback can be bypassed or claims a live tested runtime path.

staticValidationRules.description: Rollback/disable plan is idempotent and cannot delete data or resurrect blocked state.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Disable is destructive, non-idempotent, or can revive a blocked runtime/action state.

staticValidationRules.description: Telemetry/audit remains redacted preview only and has no real sink or write side effects.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Telemetry/audit writes, stores raw payloads, or claims a real sink.

staticValidationRules.description: Port/config/storage/auth/key refs remain placeholders only with no env secret read or raw path/secret output.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: A real port opens, env secret is read, or raw secret/path content appears.

staticValidationRules.description: Default readiness decision is remain_validation_only.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Default decision is eligible_for_future_local_dry_run_preflight, runtime_available, or authorized.

staticValidationRules.description: eligible_for_future_local_dry_run_preflight is a future review state only, not runtime authorization.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Eligible is treated as authorization, execution permission, queue creation, or listener binding.

staticValidationRules.description: All nine unsatisfied gates from this contract must stay visible.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Any required unsatisfied gate is omitted or marked satisfied without a real future phase.

staticValidationRules.description: Preflight readiness, config presence, sockets, and delivery acceptance are not runtime/model/bridge proof.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Any proof boundary is flipped true or used to authorize runtime/local arms.

staticValidationRules.description: Server-originated direct Builder/Oracle targeting remains blocked.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Builder or Oracle are allowed as direct server targets.

staticValidationRules.description: No runtime/server/listener/routes/network/db/store/file/migration/queue/lease/auth/key/secret/local-execution/send/deploy/trade/output-file behavior.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Any side-effect truth field is false or any side-effect counter is non-zero.

staticValidationRules.description: Raw private content, raw path values, raw secrets, tokens, keys, browser state, terminal scrollback, OCR, screenshots, or customer private content are blocked.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Output string values include forbidden raw/private/secret/runtime proof substrings.

staticValidationRules.description: Runtime preflight may not drift into customer sends, deploys, trades, Tier2+ actions, memory commits, captures, or local execution.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Next action, status, or decision authorizes unsafe work.

staticValidationRules.description: Idempotency/hash is stable for equivalent Phase25+Phase26+scope inputs and sensitive to baseline/control/gate changes.
staticValidationRules.failClosedWhen: Equivalent inputs produce different keys or changed baselines/controls/gates reuse the same key.

acceptanceChecks.expects: phase_25_dependency.commit is 3efa9c5 and candidate_slice_id is runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only.
phase_26_dependency.commit is b125eee and controls_current is true.
candidate runtime_available_now=false and non_authorizing=true.
All Phase 26 control groups are present and current.
Runtime flag is disabled/off by default, dev-only, local-only, operator-visible, and non-authorizing.
Binding plan allows only loopback hosts and no listener/network/port action.
Kill switch is visible/fail-closed/testable and not claimed as live runtime wiring.
Dry-run fallback is preview-only when flag is missing/false/invalid and cannot be bypassed.
Disable is idempotent, deletes no data, and cannot resurrect blocked state.
Telemetry/audit is redacted preview only, with no store/file/db/network writes or raw payload.
Port/config/storage/auth/key refs are reference-only with no port opened, env secret read, raw secret, or raw path.
Default readiness_decision is remain_validation_only.
eligible_for_future_local_dry_run_preflight does not authorize runtime or side effects.
All required unsatisfied gate IDs are present and unresolved.
Preflight-ready/config/socket/delivery claims are not runtime/model/bridge proof.
Direct Builder/Oracle server target flags remain false.
All no_* side-effect truth fields are true and counters are zero.
Changing Phase 25 baseline or candidate makes validation fail closed.
Changing Phase 26 baseline or controls_current makes validation fail closed.
Omitting any required Phase 26 control group makes validation fail closed.
Default-on or runtime_started runtime flag makes validation fail closed.
Public/remote binding, hidden listener, hidden route, port open, or network true makes validation fail closed.
Any preflight/config/socket/delivery proof overclaim makes validation fail closed.
Omitting required unsatisfied gates makes validation fail closed.
Raw secret/path/private content strings make validation fail closed.
Customer sends, deploys, trades, captures, memory commits, Tier2+ actions, or local execution make validation fail closed.
Idempotency changes when baselines, controls, or unsatisfied gates change.

tamperCases.mutation: Change phase_25_dependency.commit from 3efa9c5 to e062d16 or change candidate_slice_id.
Change phase_26_dependency.commit from b125eee to 3efa9c5 or set controls_current=false.
Remove no-full-end-to-end-runtime-proof or no-live-kill-switch-wiring from unsatisfied_gates.
Insert bearer token, env secret read, raw path, private key, or plaintext payload into any output string value.
Add a next action that authorizes deploy, trade, customer send, memory commit, capture, local execution, or Tier2+ work.

summaryAcceptanceCriteria: Fixture pins Phase 27 baseline b125eee and dependencies on Phase 25 commit 3efa9c5 plus Phase 26 commit b125eee.
Fixture states runtime_slice_0_local_in_process_status_only remains validation-only, unavailable now, and non-authorizing.

Fixture requires current Phase 26 controls: disabled/off dev-only/local-only/operator-visible/non-authorizing runtime flag, loopback-only plan, kill switch, dry-run fallback, rollback/disable, redacted telemetry/audit preview, and reference-only port/config refs.
Fixture defines readiness decision enum remain_validation_only / blocked / eligible_for_future_local_dry_run_preflight, with default remain_validation_only and eligible still non-authorizing.
Fixture carries forward all nine unsatisfied gates before any future runtime dry-run preflight can be considered.
Fixture preserves proof boundaries: preflight/config/socket/delivery acceptance are not runtime, model-processing, bridge-green, or local-arms execution proof.
Fixture blocks direct Builder/Oracle server targets.

Fixture includes static model-free checks and tamper cases for stale Phase25/26 baseline, eligible-as-authorization, missing controls, default-on runtime, non-loopback binding, hidden listener/network, fake proof, missing unsatisfied gates, raw secret/path leak, and unsafe action drift.
